raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Week reflection","name":"How has the last couple of weeks felt from your side, especially in terms of cross-team interactions?","description":"Opens conversation about recent experiences, focusing on cross-functional dynamics.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Specific feedback","name":"Could you share an instance where communication with the UX team was particularly challenging?","description":"Seeks concrete examples of communication challenges with the UX team.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Outcome impact","name":"How has your interaction with the UX team impacted recent project outcomes?","description":"Explores the effect of cross-functional interactions on project success.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Communication gap","name":"What specific aspects of your communication with the UX team do you think could improve?","description":"Identifies areas needing improvement in communication with the UX team.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Trust with stakeholders","name":"What do you feel is currently missing in building trust with the UX team?","description":"Probes for missing elements in the relationship with the UX team.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Communication tone","name":"What do you think affects your tone when communicating under pressure?","description":"Investigates how stress impacts communication tone.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Cross-functional alignment","name":"What would help improve alignment between you and the UX team?","description":"Seeks solutions for better alignment with the UX team.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Action steps","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?","description":"Encourages commitment to a specific action before the next meeting.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
